item.name: Receive a keep-alive heartbeat from the candidate's browser.

request.description:
Only the session owner can heartbeat their own session (participate ability).
version_lock is intentionally NOT incremented — see ExamSessionServiceImpl
and SessionRepository::updateHeartbeat for the concurrency rationale.

item.name: List all pending_review evaluations for the given session.

request.description: Requires grading.evaluate OR grading.view permission (class-level gate).

item.name: Submit a human evaluator's score for a single pending_review evaluation.

request.description:
Requires grading.evaluate permission (enforced in SubmitEvaluationRequest::authorize()).
If this was the last pending item for the session, grade re-finalization
is triggered synchronously and the final grade becomes queryable immediately.

item.name: Ingest a single proctoring event for an active session.

request.description:
Called from the candidate's browser agent or a dedicated proctoring tool.
All business logic (session state validation, candidate vs. proctor
attribution) lives in ProctoringService — this method stays thin.

item.name: List all proctoring events for a session.

request.description:
Intended for proctor/admin dashboards — the proctoring.view permission
is enforced by the policy gate in the form request or caller.
